Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:BGEU) ) has issued an announcement.

Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust has repurchased 140,000 ordinary shares at 98.00p each, with the shares to be held in treasury rather than cancelled. This move forms part of the trust’s capital management, potentially supporting the share price and net asset value per share for existing investors.

Following the transaction, the trust now holds 107,258,323 shares in treasury and has 295,185,367 shares in issue excluding treasury holdings. The updated share count provides the new denominator shareholders must use when calculating whether they need to disclose changes in their holdings under UK regulatory transparency rules.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Body & Mind ( (TSE:BAMM) ) is now available.

Body and Mind Inc. has completed the sale-related transactions involving its Illinois dispensary entities NMG IL 4 and NMG IL 1, previously disclosed in early 2025. Through its subsidiary DEP Nevada, the company received upfront cash payments, net of indebtedness and expenses, along with structured earnout provisions tied to future EBITDA performance over a defined post-approval period.

The deals provide immediate liquidity while preserving upside via performance-based earnouts, potentially strengthening Body and Mind’s balance sheet and capital flexibility. These transactions may allow the company to redeploy capital into higher-priority opportunities in its cannabis portfolio, sharpening its strategic focus and positioning within competitive U.S. state markets.

More about Body & Mind

Body and Mind Inc. is a cannabis company that operates through subsidiaries in regulated U.S. markets, focusing on retail dispensary operations. The firm targets growth through managing and monetizing dispensary assets, reflecting a strategy centered on expanding its footprint in key state-level cannabis markets such as Illinois.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$3.69M

data.description:

An update from Inchcape ( (GB:INCH) ) is now available.

Inchcape plc disclosed that its Group Chief Financial Officer, Adrian Lewis, has exercised dividend shares accrued under the company’s 2022 Performance Share Plan. He received 822 ordinary shares of 10 pence each at no cost as part of this long-term incentive arrangement.

Following the exercise, Lewis conducted a partial sale of 398 of these dividend shares on 9 April 2026 on the London Stock Exchange to cover tax and associated costs, raising £3,139.12 at a price of £7.887248 per share. The remainder of the shares are retained, modestly increasing his equity interest and aligning his remuneration further with shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:INCH) stock is a Hold with a £869.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inchcape stock, see the GB:INCH Stock Forecast page.

data.title: SBE-Varvit Publishes 2025 Financial Documents Ahead of April Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SBE-Varvit S.p.A. Class A ( (IT:VARV) ) has shared an update.

SBE-Varvit S.p.A. has made available to the public the draft separate and consolidated financial statements as at 31 December 2025, along with the independent auditors’ report and the statutory auditors’ report, ahead of its ordinary shareholders’ meeting scheduled for 30 April 2026. The documentation can be consulted at the company’s registered office, on its website and via the authorized storage system, improving transparency for investors and supporting informed voting on the upcoming corporate decisions at the meeting.

The publication of these financial and audit documents marks a key step in the company’s governance cycle, offering stakeholders a detailed view of SBE-Varvit’s recent financial performance and oversight outcomes. This disclosure helps reinforce market confidence, facilitates regulatory compliance and provides a clearer basis for assessing the company’s operational resilience and strategic positioning in its diversified industrial markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:VARV) stock is a Hold with a EUR8.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SBE-Varvit S.p.A. Class A stock, see the IT:VARV Stock Forecast page.

More about SBE-Varvit S.p.A. Class A

SBE-Varvit S.p.A. operates in the fastening components industry, producing, distributing and commercializing screws, bolts, nuts, cold and hot formed products, fasteners and highly engineered mechanical components. The company follows an integrated, vertically managed and highly disintermediated model, serving over 5,000 customers in sectors such as agricultural, construction and industrial machinery, commercial vehicles, personal mobility, wind power and infrastructure, with seven production units in Italy, one in Serbia and automated warehouses in Italy, Serbia and the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 2,514

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €638.4M

data.title: SecureTech Adds Veteran Independent Director to Strengthen Governance
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from SecureTech Innovations ( (SCTH) ).

On April 7, 2026, SecureTech Innovations announced the nomination of veteran accountant and advisor Robert V. Castro as an independent director and member of its Audit, Compensation, and Nomination Committees. Castro, a retired BDO audit partner with more than 40 years of experience serving leading financial institutions, has led large financial services practices, advised on SEC registrations and public offerings, and acted as a financial expert in high-profile legal and regulatory matters.

SecureTech’s leadership framed the move as a key step in strengthening governance and financial oversight as the company scales its operations and ambitions in AI-driven manufacturing, blockchain infrastructure, and vehicle security technologies. The nomination is part of a broader effort to bring in seasoned independent directors to its board, a strategy that could bolster investor confidence and support the company’s execution of its growth plans.

More about SecureTech Innovations

SecureTech Innovations, Inc. is a diversified technology holding company focused on artificial intelligence-driven manufacturing, blockchain-based digital infrastructure and cybersecurity, and patented vehicle security systems. Its portfolio includes AI UltraProd for AI-powered industrial 3D manufacturing, Piranha Blockchain for Web3 security and digital asset infrastructure, and Top Kontrol for vehicle anti-theft and anti-carjacking technology.

The company targets practical, transformative technologies that enhance safety, automation, and digital resilience across multiple industries, positioning itself at the intersection of advanced manufacturing, cybersecurity, and automotive security. Through its subsidiaries, SecureTech aims to serve industrial, digital asset, and transportation markets where robust security and operational efficiency are increasingly critical.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $76.85M

Wanguo International Mining Group Ltd. ( (HK:3939) ) has issued an update.

Wanguo Gold Group Limited reported that its founder, chairman and executive director, Mr. Gao Mingqing, increased his stake in the company via his wholly owned vehicle, Victor Soar Investments Limited. Following open-market purchases totaling 2,030,000 shares on 1 and 2 April 2026, Victor Soar now holds about 25.62% of the company’s issued share capital.

The board said the additional share purchases underscore Mr. Gao’s strong confidence in Wanguo Gold Group’s growth prospects and his long-term commitment to the business. Despite the higher insider ownership, the company noted that it continues to maintain sufficient public float in its shares, and advised shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution when dealing in the stock.

data.title: Phoenix Copper faces NIU-led EGM push over governance, funding clarity
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Phoenix Copper ( (GB:PXC) ) just unveiled an update.

Phoenix Copper has received a shareholder requisition from NIU Invest SE, which holds about 11.7% of its voting rights, demanding an extraordinary general meeting and signalling rising governance tensions at the Idaho-focused copper, gold and silver developer. NIU, which previously provided an initial US$5 million under an US$80 million copper bond programme to fund the Empire open pit mine but has not advanced further funding, is seeking to appoint its representative to the board and to strengthen oversight.

The proposed resolutions call for an independent external investigation into unauthorised payments disclosed by Phoenix in February and March 2026, a detailed explanation of the control failures that allowed those payments, and disclosure of the use of bond proceeds, current liquidity and near-term funding plans. Phoenix’s board has deemed the requisition valid, is in discussions with NIU, and may issue a circular in due course, while urging shareholders to take no action for now, underscoring uncertainty over governance outcomes and future financing for the Empire project.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PXC) stock is a Sell with a £2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Phoenix Copper stock, see the GB:PXC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PXC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PXC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and rising cash burn), which elevates funding and dilution risk. Technical indicators are mixed but lean soft with the price below key moving averages. Valuation provides limited support given negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on PXC stock, click here.

More about Phoenix Copper

Phoenix Copper is a London AIM- and U.S. OTCQX-listed emerging producer and exploration company focused on base and precious metals in the United States, with an initial emphasis on copper, gold and silver. Its flagship asset is the Empire Mine open-pit project in the historic Alder Creek district near Mackay, Idaho, where it holds an 80% stake and has significantly expanded mineral reserves since 2017, alongside additional nearby mines, the Red Star orebody, the Navarre Creek gold project and cobalt properties on the Idaho Cobalt Belt.

The company’s Empire Open-Pit reserve stands at 10.1 million tonnes hosting copper, gold and silver, equivalent to 66,467 tonnes of copper-equivalent metal, based on extensive drilling, geological modelling and mine design. Phoenix’s broader land package at Empire spans 8,434 acres and includes historic underground producers such as Horseshoe, White Knob and Blue Bird, positioning the group as a prospective mid-tier player in U.S. critical and precious metals mining.

Average Trading Volume: 3,127,259

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £3.17M

Learn more about PXC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
